data.content: Implementation review rejected (5th attempt): Still 10 max-lines/max-lines-per-function/max-len ESLint warnings in 7 of 14 in-scope files. Identical to 4th rejection. Violations: (1) beat-detail.tsx: max-len at lines 352, 371. (2) beat-form.tsx: max-lines-per-function — BeatForm is 176 lines (limit 100). (3) beat-metadata-details.tsx: max-len at line 191. (4) move-to-project-dialog.tsx: max-lines-per-function — MoveToProjectDialog is 110 lines (limit 100). (5) notes-dialog.tsx: max-len at line 29. (6) settings-dispatch-global-swap.tsx: max-lines-per-function — SettingsDispatchGlobalSwap is 145 lines (limit 100), also has unused formatAgentLabel import. (7) settings-sheet.tsx: max-lines-per-function — SettingsSheet is 161 lines (limit 100), plus max-len at line 119. All quality gates (tsc, test, build) pass. The issue is strictly unfixed lint violations.
